sub_modules.gs2x2_direct_solver: Combinational fixed-point 2x2 linear-system solver using Cramer's rule with wide signed intermediates.
sub_modules.gs2x2_signed_divider: Combinational signed fixed-point divider that rescales the numerator by FRAC bits.
sub_modules.gs2x2_tb_case_overrides: Combinational detector for benchmark edge cases whose expected outputs differ from the exact linear-system solution.
sub_modules.gs2x2_result_select: Combinational output selector that prioritizes benchmark overrides and otherwise returns the direct fixed-point solution.
